summary: Focused retest of the two iteration_1 failures on /exclusive-mentorships plus the regression smoke check. ALL 3 CHECKS PASS. Both fixes verified live in the browser; no regressions detected.

design_issues.screen: Console (warnings only, not blocking; carried over from iteration 1)
issues: Multiple instances of Three.js being imported (Spline runtime + GalaxyBackground)
GL_CLOSE_PATH_NV / ReadPixels GPU-stall perf notices from Chromium WebGL driver

verified_fixes.expected: 'Stop watching. Start earning.' (with two real spaces)
verified_fixes.notes: Read after scroll-into-view + 2s settle window per request guidance. innerText still uppercases via CSS (STOPWATCHING.STARTEARNING.) which is fine; the spec was on textContent and that now contains both spaces.

verified_fixes.expected: with class containing 'gradient-eyebrow', webkitBackgroundClip='text', text-fill transparent
verified_fixes.actual: exists=true, tag=P, hasGradientEyebrow=true, webkitBackgroundClip='text', webkitTextFillColor=rgba(0,0,0,0), color=rgba(0,0,0,0)
exists=true, tag=P, hasGradientEyebrow=true, webkitBackgroundClip='text', webkitTextFillColor=rgba(0,0,0,0), color=rgba(0,0,0,0)

verified_fixes.check: Regression: admin login + >=50 [data-editable-id] after entering edit mode
verified_fixes.actual: POST /api/admin/login -> 200 {ok:true}; GET /api/admin/session -> 200 {admin:true}; '✏️ Edit page' toggle clicked; querySelectorAll('[data-editable-id]').length === 62

critical_code_review_comments: Both fixes match the design intent: ExplodeText spacer now contains a real space character so textContent / innerText / screen-readers / clipboard all carry the word break. Eyebrow data-testids are forwarded through EditableText, so future test wiring is now cheap.

Optional follow-up (carried from iteration 1, NOT blocking): dedupe Three.js between @splinetool/runtime and GalaxyBackground via a webpack alias — currently two copies are loaded. Also consider migrating from THREE.Clock to THREE.Timer to silence the deprecation warning.
test_credentials: admin / kaizokuoniwa (verified working at POST /api/admin/login and GET /api/admin/session)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 closed both iteration_1 failures. /exclusive-mentorships is fully green: ExplodeText final CTA carries spaces in textContent, both eyebrow data-testids are present with .gradient-eyebrow + bg-clip:text + transparent text-fill, admin auth + inline editor still functional with 62 editable nodes. Only remaining items are non-blocking console warnings (Three.js dedupe, THREE.Clock deprecation).
rca of the issue: N/A — both bugs from iteration_1 fixed and verified.
